name: node-html5shiv
title: node-html5shiv
summary: enable use of HTML5 sectioning elements in legacy browser
description:
enable use of HTML5 sectioning elements in legacy browser
This package enables use of HTML5 sectioning elements in legacy
Internet Explorer and provides basic HTML5 styling for Internet
Explorer 6-9, Safari 4.x (and iPhone 3.x), and Firefox 3.x.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-html5shiv because enable use of HTML5 sectioning elements in legacy browser.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-html5shiv as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-html5shiv with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-html5shiv --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
